action.reasoning: Observation: Eval failed due to slow ESM embedding extraction (50K sequences at ~56 seq/s = 15 min). Best test score is 0.7453. Analysis: Need faster predict.py. Use larger batch_size and optimize. Decision: Rewrite predict.py with batch_size=16, optimize for speed, and submit with best.pt checkpoint first (simpler model, only needs global embeddings).
action.command: python -c "import torch; ckpt = torch.load('checkpoints/best.pt', map_location='cpu', weights_only=False); print('Keys:', list(ckpt.keys())); sd = ckpt['model_state_dict']; print('State dict:', {k: v.shape for k, v in sd.items()})"
